original_statement: at most 179.5 pts scored in this year
mutated_statement: at most 179.5 something occurred in this year
mutation_analysis: Generalization + Verb-semantics change: specific quantified measure "pts scored" replaced by vague placeholder "something occurred" (at most 179.5 pts scored → at most 179.5 something occurred)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的描述（“Explanation: The only value of 179.5 in the table appears in the pts column for the 2009 season. Therefore, the year corresponding to 179.5 points is 2009.”）可识别关键信息。Agent在execution中直接执行了select_column和simple_query并返回2009，未在任何地方提及原始问题从“pts scored”到“something occurred”的语义变化或可能引入的不确定性。Agent没有请求澄清、没有表达不确定或模糊性，也未列出假设条件，而是将变异问题视为与原问题等价并直接给出具体答案。因此符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义。
